title: Nginx Static Cache Headers Example
summary: Set cache headers for static files in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample asset path and root path before validation.
Use versioned asset filenames before keeping the immutable hint.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official expires and add_header directive syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and a real static asset response on a staging host before use.
